-- 62 of 123 --

One Sentence Persuasion
People will do anything for those
who encourage their dreams,
justify their failures, allay their
fears, confirm their suspicions
and help them throw rocks at
their enemies.
-­‐ Blair Warren
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
